{"northstar":"Create a great brand that solves a problem which people love to consume, which creates €10k a month revenue in the initial phases only and scaling up really quick.","tasks":[{"id":"mrt8j8gc","text":"questions for Dogu","status":"todo","prio":"med","due":"","note":"Discussion & Action Items
Product Development
* Once I have the formulations for all 17 shades, what approximate budget should I allocate for:
    * Packaging
    * Labels/Stickers
    * Initial production materials
* The fragrance will be added later and developed in Turkey.
* Research the ingredient: Sipikür (confirm the correct spelling and identify its purpose and suppliers).

Regulatory & Compliance:
* Do these products require UTS registration in Turkey?
* What is the equivalent regulatory registration or notification system for products sold internationally (especially in the EU and other export markets)?
* What tests, certifications, and regulatory approvals are required to legally sell these products in Europe?
    * Example: requirements for Mannamind-type products (supplements, cosmetics, etc.).

Manufacturing: 
* Konaltas is preparing a quotation. They will ask for the required production quantity (MOQ).

Brand & Business Strategy:
* Is our current company infrastructure ready for launching and selling these products?
* With our existing setup, are we operationally prepared to begin sales?
* At what stage should I establish companies abroad (EU, US, etc.)?
* Does it make sense to launch multiple brands from the beginning?
* Or should I follow a Davines-style strategy by building one master brand that unites multiple product categories under a single philosophy, for example:
    * Women’s haircare
    * Men’s hair loss prevention and regrowth
    * Food supplements
    * Deodorants
    * Other personal care products

Packaging & Country of Origin: 
* Would it make sense to use “Designed in Holland” on the packaging?
* I prefer not to emphasize that the product is manufactured in China or Turkey. What are the legal and practical ways to position the brand internationally while remaining compliant with labeling regulations?

Consumer Products:
* How can we develop and launch a consumer/home-use hair color line?

Sales & Distribution:
* How can I sell products from Turkey to Germany through Trendyol?
* Does Trendyol currently support sales into Arab countries?

Suppliers:
